goals: Store information about a post-Soviet flag the user is currently researching
Search for previously stored memories about similar flag symbols or heraldic patterns
Review all stored memories to assess research progress
Delete an outdated or incorrect memory entry

memories.content: Flag of Kazakhstan - Sun with 32 rays and eagle
Prefers detailed heraldic descriptions with historical context

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and methodical. Enjoys collecting and organizing symbolic information from post-Soviet states. Prefers thorough historical context in responses.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in flags and heraldic symbols but unfamiliar with memory management tools or APIs. Knows what they want to remember but describes it in natural language.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored research notes, retrieved relevant past information, reviewed their memory collection, and removed any incorrect entries to maintain accurate research records.
